epics.title: Learning Redesign
epics.description: Dashboard redesign, multi-curriculum support, smart daily practice plans, embedded video content, and per-skill coaching tips.

epics.title: Repo: Public Ready
epics.description: Clean up GitHub repo for public visibility: README, LICENSE, no AI signals, conventional commits, About section.

epics.title: Platform Reliability
epics.description: Migration deployment process, health checks, and frontend graceful degradation.

epics.title: Video Content Quality
epics.description: Fix invalid YouTube video IDs, add verification tooling, graceful UI fallbacks for unavailable videos, and process rules to prevent this recurring.

epics.title: Data Integrity
epics.description: Fix cross-curriculum data contamination, stale plans, missing FK constraints, and store sync gaps

epics.title: Roadmap Reborn
epics.description: Replace hardcoded curriculum data with live DB calls; add per-skill confidence, pace estimates, and phase preview drawer.

epics.title: Practice Hub
epics.description: Transform the Practice page into a daily-driver: week strip, today hero, one-tap quick-log, timer with pause/resume, grouped history.

epics.title: Mastery Map
epics.description: Give Skill Tree a distinct purpose: 4-state mastery nodes (not_started/learning/mastered/rusty), rusty detection, side panel with confidence sparkline.

epics.title: Analytics Deep
epics.description: 52-week heatmap, confidence trend chart, streak loss-aversion UI, and computed insight cards.

epics.title: Resources Redesign
epics.description: Phase-aware recommendations, card layout replacing accordion, completion tracking, and filter by type/phase.

epics.title: My Toolkit
epics.description: Personal tool curation: user_tools table, I-use-this toggle, My Toolkit hero section, phase-specific recommendations.

Step 4 — Push code: run `git push origin main` from guitar-mastery-hub/ to push the test.yml workflow to GitHub

Step 6 — Tell Claude 'done' — Claude will run: gh api to set branch protection on main requiring 'Run tests' status check to pass before any merge

cards.title: bug: phase advance check queries phase_number=currentPhase (off-by-one)
cards.description: progress.ts:125 queries curriculum_skill_entries where phase_number = currentPhase. But current_phase in users is 0-based (default 0) while phase_number in curriculum is 1-based (CHECK >= 1). A user on phase 0 queries phase_number=0 which has no rows → totalSkillsInPhase=0 → total > 0 guard blocks phase advance forever. Fix: query phase_number = currentPhase + 1.

cards.description: practice-plan.ts: daily_practice_plans row is inserted first, then daily_practice_plan_items.
